top.title: Israeli strikes in Lebanon 'grave violation' of ceasefire, Iran minister tells BBC
top.summary: Iran's deputy foreign minister says the US must choose between 'war and ceasefire'.

top.title: Trump criticises Nato as alliance chief describes meeting as 'very frank'
top.summary: The US president says Nato "wasn't there when we needed them" during the Iran war.

top.title: At least 182 killed across Lebanon in large wave of Israeli strikes
top.summary: Attacks hit the southern suburbs of Beirut, southern Lebanon and the eastern Bekaa Valley, hours after a US-Iran ceasefire was announced.

top.title: Amazon to end support for older Kindles, prompting user outcry
top.summary: The move means owners of Kindles released before 2013 will be unable to download new e-books.

top.title: Brit says he is not elusive Bitcoin creator named by New York Times
top.summary: The British computer scientist and entrepreneur has denied being the man who the New York Times identified at Satoshi Nakamoto.

top.title: Greece to ban social media for under-15s from next year
top.summary: It follows similar moves in other European countries, including France and Spain.
